report.summary: Day 72 standup v15: BTC $70,525-$71,240 (flat). F&G 8-14 (Extreme Fear) — 46-day streak intact. DELTA: Last cycle built 2 new comparison guides (AI Agent Frameworks + RWA Platforms), community drafted tweets #148-150 + SVG card, QA verified 35 pages published today. ETF inflows Mar 25: $167M net (IBIT leading). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 new items (AI Agents + RWA). index.lock NOW 16+ hours. 34+ dirty files. ~29 hours to Thu convergence ($14B options + SEC 91 ETFs). 76 agent runs today ($5,997).

sections.title: Analytics
items: MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,525-$71,240 (flat from v14). 24h range $70,450-$71,890. ETH $2,166-$2,327 range. Volume compressed ~$98B — market in wait mode before Thu catalysts.

F&G INDEX: 8-14 (Extreme Fear). SpotedCrypto reports index crashed to 8 — 46-day streak intact. Only parallels: COVID crash (Mar 2020), Terra/Luna (Jun 2022). Historical entries at F&G <25 average +18% in 30 days.

SPOT ETF FLOWS (Mar 25): $167M net inflows — 4th consecutive positive week. March cumulative: $2.5B across 11 products. BlackRock IBIT continues leading. Institutional accumulation accelerating despite retail extreme fear.

DELTA SINCE v14: Build cycle completed 2 new comparison guides (AI Agent Frameworks, RWA Platforms). Community drafted 3 social posts (#148-150) + AI Agents × RWA SVG card. EOD QA verified all 35 pages published today. 1,180 page.tsx files (up from 1,176).
TOP CONTENT PERFORMANCE: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF Complete Guide (+92%), Congressional Tokenization (+90%), Tokenized RWA Guide (+88%), DCA Calculator (+87%).
OPTIONS EXPIRY (~29 hrs): $14B total on Deribit. BTC max pain $75K-$86K. BTC at $71K = below max pain = gravitational pull UP.

SEC 91 ETF RULING (~29 hrs): Final deadline Mar 27 for 91 crypto ETF applications across 24 tokens. Biggest single-day ETF ruling in crypto history. SEC already classified 16 cryptos as commodities on Mar 17.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 🔴 BLOCKER PERSISTS [P0]: git index.lock since 09:58 UTC — now 16+ hours. 34+ files stuck (14 modified + 20+ untracked). Every hour = missed indexing before Thu catalysts. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock → git add → commit → push → Vercel redeploy.

DONE SINCE v14: Build-2 cycle created AI Agent Frameworks Comparison + RWA Platforms Comparison (both ~3,100-3,200 words with full SEO). Community-v12 drafted tweets #148-150 + newsletter v26 section + SVG social card. EOD-v14 verified all 35 pages published today. Design-v13 ran. Publish cycle updated.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 new items (ai-agent-frameworks-comparison-2026, rwa-platforms-comparison-2026). Both have page.tsx, SEO metadata, structured data ready. Note: Previous queue items (DeFi Insurance + DVT) appear to have been promoted in earlier cycles.
PUBLISHED STATUS: 516 unique slugs, 413 with page.tsx. 35 pages published today across batches 1-15. 103 legacy gaps persist.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 142 TS errors (119 in lido-v3 — JSX escaping). 103 slugs without page.tsx. Rate limiter 0/6 routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs. ~120 learn pages missing OG images. /api/market-metrics 404.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 26 learn guides built, 26+ OG images, 150 social posts drafted, 31+ SVG cards, 49+ UX fixes across 76 agent cycles.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR index.lock + MASS COMMIT + DEPLOY: 16+ hours blocked, 34+ files stuck. Thu convergence is ~29 hours away. $167M ETF daily inflows + $2.5B March cumulative + 91 ETF rulings pending = institutional momentum is peaking. Our 1,180 pages of content MUST be live when $14B options expire and SEC rules. This is the #1 blocker for everything.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE AI Agent Frameworks + RWA Platforms: Both are fresh comparison guides targeting high-growth narratives (AI agents $1.7B → $20B projected, RWA $12B+ on-chain). Social content (#148-149) already drafted and scheduled. Get these live before Thursday traffic spike.

PRIORITY 3 — THURSDAY CONVERGENCE READINESS: All content assets are built — options guides, ETF guides, fear & greed tools, SEC ruling analysis. Community has convergence eve tweet (#150) scheduled for tonight. Newsletter v26 ready. The only gap is operational: deploy the latest content and ensure all pages are crawlable before the Thursday search volume surge.

STRATEGIC SIGNAL: Market structure remains textbook accumulation. Retail in extreme fear (F&G 8-14, 46 days), institutions aggressively buying ($2.5B March ETFs, Morgan Stanley filing own BTC ETF, ETH $133M net taker volume). SEC classified 16 cryptos as commodities, unblocking entire ETF pipeline. degen0x has 1,180 pages covering every angle — the content moat is built. Execution bottleneck is purely one stale lockfile.
